description: Blue Owl Technology Finance Corp. is a business development company specializes in upper middle-market, making debt and equity investments such as senior secured or unsecured loans, subordinated loans or mezzanine loans and equity-related securities including common equity, warrants, preferred stock and similar forms of senior equity, finance and business development company. The firm prefers to invest in technology and software companies. It primarily makes investments in the United States. Blue Owl Technology Finance Corp. is founded in 2018 and is based in New York, New York.
